title: requests — broadcast channels
description: Real-time broadcast channels this module owns. Registered by `AccessRequestServiceProvider::registerBroadcastChannels()`. Two channels: a tenant-wide feed for the admin dashboard, and a per-user feed for the requester's and approvers' inbox updates.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.access-requests
channels.description: Tenant-wide access-request feed. Every AccessRequest event broadcasts here so admin dashboards can live-update the list of open requests. Batched — a burst of approver decisions in bulk-approve coalesces to one broadcast per instance.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has `access-requests.viewAny`

channels.name: user.{userId}.access-requests
channels.description: Per-user access-request feed. Requesters subscribe to see status updates on their own requests; approvers subscribe to see new incoming requests they need to review. Auth: the caller IS the user.
events: AccessRequestSubmitted (for approvers only — filtered on payload.approver_ids)

notes: The `user.{userId}.access-requests` channel replaces per-request polling for the pending-my-review inbox. When an approver has the SPA open, a new request lands live in their inbox without a refresh.

`AccessRequestApproved` fires on BOTH channels — the tenant admin dashboard sees the state change AND the requester sees their personal notification. This is by design: the two audiences care about different projections of the same event.
